content.body:
Status: shows runtime, storage type, doc counts by type, tag count, stale count.
Doctor: 6 diagnostic checks — .leo/ writable, config valid, docs dir exists,
schema validation, index consistency (orphan detection), profile validation.

Export: copies docs + index + schema to portable directory.
Import: merge mode (skip existing) or replace mode (backup + replace).
Validates schema on each imported doc, rebuilds index after.
Round-trip tested: export → delete → import → same KB.

All implemented TDD-first by specialist agents (sonnet):
- 22 new tests across ops_test.go and export_test.go
- Tests written and verified failing before implementation
- internal/cmd coverage: 77.2%

Closes #21, closes #22

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cli): implement status, doctor, export, and import commands (TDD)
